arts.ttl: Chelsea set to HIJACK €90m Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: The 22-year-old was expected to seal an Old Trafford transfer this summer, but Man Utd were unwilling to match Everton’s reported asking price of €90 million (£75m) and Branthwaite remained at Goodison Park. Chelsea have been tipped to rival Manchester United for the signing of Everton defender Jarrad Branthwaite in 2025.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Gomes's reps now in talks with Red Devils
arts.sum: Angel Gomes ' representatives are in talks with Manchester United, according to reports, while he is on Tottenham's radar too. Over the last three years, Gomes has amassed 129 appearances for the French club.

arts.sum: Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies is nearing the end of his contract and in just a few weeks’ time can start negotiating a free transfer abroad for next season. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Diego León to Manchester United – Expert view from Paraguay on teen sensation
arts.sum: Diego León has been at the centre of Manchester United transfer talk this week, with reports from Paraguay revealing the club have reached a deal to buy the 17-year-old left-back from Cerro Porteño. arts.sum: United States international Antonee Robinson has been one of the most consistent left-backs in the Premier League since Fulham returned to the top-flight before the 2022/2023 season.
